demographics.audit_notes: Corrected all values based on 1990 Decennial Census data for Tract 20.02. Original population of 8210 was extremely high and inconsistent with census records, indicating a fundamental data error in the source.
Values are linearly interpolated between 1990 and 2000 Census data points after correcting the original dataset's flawed anchor points.
